templates.name: approve_apply
templates.summary: Render an approve/decline detail_card with two buttons, pause, then resume
templates.description:
Render an approve/decline detail_card with two buttons, pause, then resume
into one of three step ids based on the user's choice. Wire `on_other` to
a collect / re-analyze step so users can update fields during the preview
without cancelling the workflow.

params.name: preview
params.describe: Preview body shown on the approve/decline card.

params.name: apply
params.describe: Step id to goto when approved.

params.name: abort
params.describe: Step id to goto when declined (XOR abort_render).

params.name: abort_render
params.describe: Inline render shown on decline + end aborted (XOR abort).

params.name: on_other
params.describe: Step id when resume is neither approve nor decline (e.g. user typed fields).

params.name: confirm_title
params.describe: Approve-button title (locale-resolved at render). Default: Arabic تأكيد ✅.

params.name: cancel_title
params.describe: Decline-button title (locale-resolved at render). Default: Arabic إلغاء ❌.

params.name: memory_note
params.describe: Breadcrumb (with {$expr} interpolation) attached to the approve/decline render — surfaced next turn.
